title: Pigstep stereo mix
description: Replaces Pigstep mono mix with stereo mix.
body:
# Pigstep stereo mix

This resource pack replaces the in-game mono mix of the song "Pigstep" with a stereo mix that better emphasizes the spatial placement of the various instruments, providing a more detailed musical experience.

License: CC0, as long as you comply with the [Minecraft EULA](https://www.minecraft.net/en-us/eula)

Version: The source package is listed as version 1.21.5, but is compatible with versions 1.16 and later.

![logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/df0aee38047ee7b90b852c0adca77afab597989b.png)


<details>
<summary>My other projects</summary>

* ## OptiClient
  ⚡High FPS, lots of supported optifine features, free custom capes, controller support, and much more! All in one modpack!⚡ 1.21.5 beta! 
  [Link](https://modrinth.com/modpack/opticlient)

* ## No java edition subtitle
  Removes the "java edition" label from the main menu! 
  [Link](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/no-java-edition-subtitle)

</details>
